channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: How Blocking My Social Media Apps Made Me Feel More Present
item.description: In a recent personal experiment, Sally Pryor shares her experience of using a device called 'Brick' to block social media apps on her phone. After a period of frustration and reflection, Sally found h...

item.title: Delhi Judge Expressed Distress to Father Before Death
item.description: The news reports that a Delhi judge, in the hours preceding his untimely death, conveyed to his father that he was troubled and finding life extremely difficult to bear. While the full details of the ...

item.title: Some European Countries Consider Suspending EES System to Ease Airport Crowds
item.description: Following Greece's recent decision to suspend the EU Entry/Exit System (EES) for Serbian citizens from June 1 to August 30, news indicates that Italy and Portugal are considering similar measures for ...

item.title: 53-Year-Old Parliament Chef Dies After Stabbing Incident in Rongai
item.description: In a tragic incident in Ongata Rongai, Kajiado County, Kamau Mungai Gathogo, a 53-year-old chef at the National Assembly, was allegedly stabbed to death by his 31-year-old girlfriend, Catherine Muthok...

item.title: Missing Vosloorus man, Mazwi Kubheka, found alive after walking into police station
item.description: After nearly a month of uncertainty and worry, 27-year-old Mazwi Mpumelelo Kubheka has been found alive, presenting himself at the Vosloorus police station on Saturday evening. Kubheka had been report...

item.title: Melty Blood: Twi-Lumina Coming to Switch 1 & 2 in Early 2027
item.description: At EVO Japan, developer French Bread and publisher Aniplex unveiled the upcoming 2D fighting game Melty Blood: Twi-Lumina with a teaser trailer. Scheduled for release in early 2027, the game will be a...

item.title: AI Struggles Again to Predict Kentucky Derby Winners
item.description: Despite advances in AI, predictions for the 2026 Kentucky Derby made by Claude and Microsoft Copilot were far from accurate. Both AI systems used statistical analysis, odds, expert picks, and race his...

item.title: How a digital arrest scam cost Rs 10 lakh and the process of recovering part of the money
item.description: This article narrates a real-life case of a ‘digital arrest’ scam in India, where fraudsters impersonate law enforcement officials to extort money. The author recounts how his father was deceived into...

item.title: Competitive Horse Racing Returns to Century Mile Racetrack for 2026 Season
item.description: Century Mile Racetrack in Edmonton is set to welcome back competitive horse racing for the 2026 season. After a highly successful 2025 season, organisers are expecting an even bigger turnout this year...

item.title: Notable Indian Fiction Releases in May: Novels and Short Stories from Across the Country
item.description: This article presents a curated list of Indian fiction books released in May, offering readers a diverse selection to enjoy during the warmer months. The list includes historical novels, novellas, and...

item.title: Common Oversights to Avoid When Writing a Will
item.description: Writing a will is one of the most important legal steps a person can take to ensure their wishes are respected after death. While many focus on major assets such as properties, bank accounts, and fami...

item.title: Kathy Hilton Denies Liability in Lawsuit Filed by Injured House Guest
item.description: Kathy Hilton, star of 'Real Housewives of Beverly Hills,' is facing a lawsuit from a house guest who claims to have injured herself after falling at Kathy's Bel Air mansion in 2024. The guest, Kimberl...

item.title: World Barista Champion Visits PH to Promote Filipino Coffee
item.description: Boram Um, the reigning World Barista Champion, has arrived in the Philippines to shine a spotlight on the country's rich coffee culture. During his visit, Um plans to meet with local coffee farmers, p...

item.title: Cardiff University fined after staff develop lifelong asthma from lab animal exposure
item.description: Cardiff University has been fined £280,000 after two laboratory staff members developed asthma as a result of exposure to animal allergens. The Health and Safety Executive (HSE) revealed that the univ...

item.title: Family Seeks Justice After Autopsy Confirms Constance Githinji Was Killed in Kileleshwa
item.description: Nairobi residents were shaken after the tragic death of Constance Githinji, a 22-year-old ICT student at Muranga University. Initially reported as an apparent suicide, an autopsy conducted by both gov...

item.title: How African Food Systems Can Manage Fertiliser Shortages Amid Global Conflicts
item.description: Africa depends heavily on imported fertiliser, with about 80% of its supply coming from countries like Iran, Russia, Europe, India, China, and Gulf states. The conflict in Iran, particularly the disru...

item.title: AfriForum and MK Party engage in dialogue on constitutional changes and cooperation
item.description: AfriForum CEO Kallie Kriel recently met with MK Party leader Jacob Zuma in what he described as a “very constructive” engagement, aimed at addressing key national issues despite political differences....

item.title: Malcolm Rosas Jr kicks seven goals as Sydney Swans defeat Melbourne Demons
item.description: In a high-scoring AFL encounter at the Sydney Cricket Ground, Malcolm Rosas Jr delivered a standout performance with a career-best seven goals to lead the Sydney Swans to a 17-point victory over the M...

item.title: Reinstating a Liberal Caucus Could Improve Senate Accountability
item.description: Prime Minister Mark Carney now holds a majority in the House of Commons, thanks to three Liberal byelection victories and five floor-crossings. This majority gives his government broad legislative pow...

item.title: Greg Abel Outlines Strategy for Berkshire Hathaway Following Buffett's Retirement
item.description: Greg Abel, at 63, addressed Berkshire Hathaway shareholders at the company's annual meeting in Omaha, Nebraska, just four months after taking over as CEO from Warren Buffett. Abel emphasised his commi...
